text: While participation and performance trends in single-stage events such as Ironman Hawaii have been the subject of numerous investigations, little is known regarding trends for multi-stage ultra-triathlons such as the 515 km Ultraman Hawaii. The primary aim of this investigation was to describe longitudinal trends in participation and performance in this three-day race, whilst identifying differences between the sexes in overall and split-time performance, and the age at peak performance.
explanation: The text uses very generic, formulaic academic phrasing and lacks concrete study details or distinctive voice. This pattern is common in AI-generated abstracts.
